description: Pinned external packaging inputs for ObjcMarkdown. These are fetched into a packaging workspace as needed and are not git submodules of the main repo.

inputs.purpose: Bundle the Adwaita GNUstep theme for Linux/AppImage packaging.
notes: Treat this as a packaging-time workspace dependency, not a source submodule.
Pin the exact commit used for a release in downstream packaging automation or release notes.

inputs.purpose: Preferred Windows GNUstep theme to bundle and default to in MSI packaging when the toolchain can build it coherently.
notes: Current Windows msys2/clang64 build VM is blocked by a libdispatch/CRT mode_t header conflict before this theme can be bundled.
Keep this pinned as an external input rather than a git submodule.

inputs.purpose: Secondary Windows GNUstep theme bundled alongside WinUITheme in MSI packaging.
notes: This private input is optional for ObjcMarkdown MSI release candidates; WinUITheme is the required bundled default.
Track the exact working commit outside the app repo.
